productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Ess Mf Yoga Black Pants
description: Composition Full length black yoga pants made of 92% polyster, 8% Lycra, comfortable elastic waist band brand name and logo printed on the left leg, and engineered with ClimaLite technology Fitting Regular Washcare Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 Degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on prints/trims/logo Yoga is a time for relaxation and extreme comfort. Wear these black yoga pants from adidas to get the best results during your sessions. Perform all the complicated yoga positions with ease, and look stylish at the same time! Engineered with ClimaLite technology, the pants draw sweat away from the skin to keep you dry and comfortable at all times. And the Lycra in them guarantees a great Fit. Team it with a comfortable t-shirt and get into position! Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
